test_cases.description: Verifies ideas are matched to the user's stage and budget rather than generic advice
test_cases.input: Sono una startup early stage senza budget. Che idee di marketing ho?

test_cases.description: Verifies each recommended idea includes implementation steps and expected outcome
test_cases.input: Suggerisci 3 strategie di growth marketing per un SaaS project management B2B

test_cases.description: Verifies ideas span multiple categories when appropriate (content, community, product-led)
test_cases.input: Cosa posso fare gratuitamente per acquisire i primi 100 utenti?
